context: Expense reimbursement policy for Off-Mic Media contractors and production team in Johannesburg.

validation_rules.notes: Receipt or tax invoice required for all claims in ZAR.
Claims over R2000 require producer approval before payment.
validation_rules.requirement: Manager approval for amounts above R2000

validation_rules.notes: Claims must be submitted within 30 days of the expense date.
Only production, travel, and supporter-shop costs are reimbursable. Personal items and meals outside production time are not eligible.
Foreign currency claims (USD, GBP) require an exchange-rate screenshot at the date of purchase.
Alcohol may only be claimed when entertaining a confirmed guest, with the guest name on the receipt or in the notes.
Personal travel costs around a work trip — extra hotel nights, partner flights — are explicitly not reimbursable.
Equipment over R5000 (microphones, headphones, recorders) must be booked as an asset, not an expense.
Subscription auto-renewals are not reimbursable without the original approved purchase order.
Mileage on Asha's personal car (VW Polo) for off-site interviews is paid at the SARS rate per kilometre.
Travel between home and the Rhythm FM studio is daily commute, not reimbursable.
Guest travel and accommodation (e.g. driving a Voices guest from Soweto) is reimbursable with a brief justification note.
Tips above 15% require a justification note attached to the claim.
Gifts to guests cannot exceed R500 without producer sign-off.
US contractor payments (Diego, audio editor) reconcile through Gusto — not via this reimbursement workflow.
